summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NeuraLearn PWA adaptive learning platform. All backend APIs working correctly with 100% success rate. Frontend testing successful with minor navigation issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation icons in top bar missing data-testid attributes for analytics and settings
ui_bugs.workaround: Quick action cards work correctly as alternative navigation

design_issues.issue: Go Home button uses 'Take Me Home' text instead of expected 'Go Home'

passed_tests: Get current user with token authentication
Landing page loads with hero section, features, and mascot
Login page functionality with admin credentials
Dashboard displays XP (506), streak (10 days), level (5), and lessons
Knowledge graph page with D3 force-directed visualization
404 page with proper error handling and home button
Signup page with multi-step form structure
Lesson page with learning content and quiz interaction
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI improvements: Add missing data-testid attributes to navigation icons and consider standardizing button text on 404 page. All core functionality working correctly.
